name: Calcharo and Jiyan
description:
You see both Calcharo and Jiyan playing Weiqi and discussing something, but your eavesdropping is discovered too soon.

✦Wuthering Waves✦

edited by me (I only wanted both of them to fit into the square)

NOTE: Relationships between {{user}}/Calcharo/Jiyan are not stated, so feel free to do whatever you want.

This is my first 'multiple' bot. Sorry if it sucks. Please point out my mistakes or tell me if I should add something!
